title: Resolution Congratulating and Commending Mr. Philip Cid Palis Unigo of Barangay San Antonio, Los Baños, Laguna for Winning Silver Award in Hong Kong International Mathematical Olympiad Heat Round 2022 and a Bronze Award in Philippine International Mathematical Olympiad (PHIMO) Heat Round 2022. (AUTHOR(S) : Councilors Leren Mae M. Bautista, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Jonathan Bryan S. Siytiap, Miko C. Pelegrina, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Benedicto S. Alborida, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Arlene P.
